item.title: GSequencer [Music Production]
item.itunes:title: GSequencer [Music Production]
item.itunes:author: joel2001k
item.itunes:summary:
GSequencer
(Music Production)
Advanced Gtk+ Sequencer is a tree based audio processing engine released under the terms of the GNU GPLv3+. It uses extensively threads, supporting LADSPA, DSSI and Lv2 plugin format.
You output to your soundcard using panel, mixer to combine different instruments like drum, matrix, synth, FM synth, SF2 synth, SFZ synth and audio recorder.

[read more]
item.description:
GSequencer
(Music Production)
Advanced Gtk+ Sequencer is a tree based audio processing engine released under the terms of the GNU GPLv3+. It uses extensively threads, supporting LADSPA, DSSI and Lv2 plugin format.
You output to your soundcard using panel, mixer to combine different instruments like drum, matrix, synth, FM synth, SF2 synth, SFZ synth and audio recorder.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GSequencer
(Music Production)
Advanced Gtk+ Sequencer is a tree based audio processing engine released under the terms of the GNU GPLv3+. It uses extensively threads, supporting LADSPA, DSSI and Lv2 plugin format.
You output to your soundcard using panel, mixer to combine different instruments like drum, matrix, synth, FM synth, SF2 synth, SFZ synth and audio recorder.

[read more]

item.title: VocabSieve [E-Learning]
item.itunes:title: VocabSieve [E-Learning]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
VocabSieve
(E-Learning)
VocabSieve is a program for language learning with Anki. Its primary use is sentence mining, in which sentences with target vocabulary words are collected and added into Anki. It is meant to help intermediate learners gain vocabulary efficiently by allowing card creation without interrupting the flow of content immersion. It can also import notes from ereaders (Kindle and ereaders running KOReader), so you can effortlessly make cards with minimal interruption to your reading.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]
item.description:

(E-Learning)
VocabSieve is a program for language learning with Anki. Its primary use is sentence mining, in which sentences with target vocabulary words are collected and added into Anki. It is meant to help intermediate learners gain vocabulary efficiently by allowing card creation without interrupting the flow of content immersion. It can also import notes from ereaders (Kindle and ereaders running KOReader), so you can effortlessly make cards with minimal interruption to your reading.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
VocabSieve
(E-Learning)
VocabSieve is a program for language learning with Anki. Its primary use is sentence mining, in which sentences with target vocabulary words are collected and added into Anki. It is meant to help intermediate learners gain vocabulary efficiently by allowing card creation without interrupting the flow of content immersion. It can also import notes from ereaders (Kindle and ereaders running KOReader), so you can effortlessly make cards with minimal interruption to your reading.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]

item.title: Pinokio [Browser]
item.itunes:title: Pinokio [Browser]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Pinokio
(Browser)
Pinokio is a browser that lets you install, run, and programmatically control ANY application, automatically.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.


[read more]

[read more]

item.title: Hiddify [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Hiddify [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Hiddify
(Internet Apps)
A multi-platform proxy client based on Sing-box universal proxy tool-chain. Hiddify offers a wide range of capabilities, like automatic node selection, TUN mode, remote profiles etc. Hiddify is ad-free and open-source. With support for a wide range of protocols, it provides a secure and private way for accessing free internet.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]
item.description:
Hiddify
(Internet Apps)
A multi-platform proxy client based on Sing-box universal proxy tool-chain. Hiddify offers a wide range of capabilities, like automatic node selection, TUN mode, remote profiles etc. Hiddify is ad-free and open-source. With support for a wide range of protocols, it provides a secure and private way for accessing free internet.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Hiddify
(Internet Apps)
A multi-platform proxy client based on Sing-box universal proxy tool-chain. Hiddify offers a wide range of capabilities, like automatic node selection, TUN mode, remote profiles etc. Hiddify is ad-free and open-source. With support for a wide range of protocols, it provides a secure and private way for accessing free internet.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]

item.title: NVTOP [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: NVTOP [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
NVTOP
(Graphic Apps)
NVTOP stands for Neat Videocard TOP, a (h)top like task monitor for AMD, Intel and NVIDIA GPUs. It can handle multiple GPUs and print information about them in a htop-familiar way.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]
item.description:
NVTOP
(Graphic Apps)
NVTOP stands for Neat Videocard TOP, a (h)top like task monitor for AMD, Intel and NVIDIA GPUs. It can handle multiple GPUs and print information about them in a htop-familiar way.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
NVTOP
(Graphic Apps)
NVTOP stands for Neat Videocard TOP, a (h)top like task monitor for AMD, Intel and NVIDIA GPUs. It can handle multiple GPUs and print information about them in a htop-familiar way.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

[read more]

item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Begonia Recovery Project HyperOs A14 Redmi Note 12 Pro 5g [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: Begonia Recovery Project HyperOs A14 Redmi Note 12 Pro 5g [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: santoshhh000
item.itunes:summary:
Begonia Recovery Project HyperOs A14 Redmi Note 12 Pro 5g
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
Fastboot zip for flashing recovery on Redmi Note 12 Pro
For A12 : https://www.pling.com/p/2045416/
For A13 : https://www.pling.com/p/2085880/
For A14:this one
Follow Alltricks YouTube channel for support
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8U8ljrEIniE&t=0s
[read more]

item.title: Dhewm3 [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: Dhewm3 [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: tx00100xt
item.itunes:summary:
Dhewm3
(Shooter)
Dhewm 3 is a source port of the original Doom 3 (not Doom 3 BFG, for that you may want to try RBDoom3BFG). It's known to work on Windows, Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, OpenBSD and AROS, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports OpenGL 1.4 with ARB shaders, SDL and OpenAL.
Compared to the original version of Doom 3, Dhewm 3 has many bugfixes, supports EAX-like sound effects on all operating systems and hardware (via OpenAL Softs EFX support), has much better support for widescreen resolutions and has 64bit support.
Note that while the Doom 3 source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Dhewm 3 the game data to play. See the How to Install section for more information.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/dhewm3-appimage

[read more]
item.description:
Dhewm3
(Shooter)
Dhewm 3 is a source port of the original Doom 3 (not Doom 3 BFG, for that you may want to try RBDoom3BFG). It's known to work on Windows, Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, OpenBSD and AROS, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports OpenGL 1.4 with ARB shaders, SDL and OpenAL.
Compared to the original version of Doom 3, Dhewm 3 has many bugfixes, supports EAX-like sound effects on all operating systems and hardware (via OpenAL Softs EFX support), has much better support for widescreen resolutions and has 64bit support.
Note that while the Doom 3 source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Dhewm 3 the game data to play. See the How to Install section for more information.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/dhewm3-appimage

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Dhewm3
(Shooter)
Dhewm 3 is a source port of the original Doom 3 (not Doom 3 BFG, for that you may want to try RBDoom3BFG). It's known to work on Windows, Linux, macOS, FreeBSD, OpenBSD and AROS, but it should work on (or be easily portable to) any system that supports OpenGL 1.4 with ARB shaders, SDL and OpenAL.
Compared to the original version of Doom 3, Dhewm 3 has many bugfixes, supports EAX-like sound effects on all operating systems and hardware (via OpenAL Softs EFX support), has much better support for widescreen resolutions and has 64bit support.
Note that while the Doom 3 source code has been released under GPL, you still need to legally own the game and provide Dhewm 3 the game data to play. See the How to Install section for more information.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/dhewm3-appimage

[read more]

item.title: Yamagi Quake II [Shooter]
item.itunes:title: Yamagi Quake II [Shooter]
item.itunes:author: tx00100xt
item.itunes:summary:
Yamagi Quake II
(Shooter)
Yamagi Quake II is an alternative client for id Software's Quake II. Our goal is to provide the best Quake II experience possible, we strive to preserve the gameplay as it was back in 1997. Thus we aim mostly for bug fixes, stability and gentle enhancements were appropriate. Yamagi Quake II has a lot of unique features. The most notables ones are:
A modern OpenGL 3.2 renderer, providing a greatly enhanced look and feel. The original OpenGL 1.4 and even the Software renderers are still supported. Both 3D accelerated renderers support anisotropic filtering and multisampling anti aliasing.
Full support for widescreen displays and arbitrary resolutions. The HUD can be scaled to be readable on high resolutions.
Support for surround sound, from stereo up to 7.1 channels and even HRTF. The background music can be played from OGG/Vorbis files, a CD drive is no longer necessary.
A rewritten savegame system. Yamagi Quake II savegames are completely reliable and backward compatible between releases as long as the principle architecture stays the same.
Highly precise timings. For example, on a flat panel display with a 59.95 hertz refresh rate and vertical synchronisation (VSync) enabled Yamagi Quake II is running at exactly 59.95 frames per second.
In comparison with the original client over 1.500 bugs were fixed. The Yamagi Quake II client is very well tested and stable. The dedicated server is able to run for weeks without a single restart. Last but not least the code is fully 64 bit clean and highly portable.

Commercial data files are required to run the supported game. These can be aquired though a multitude of sources. See the manual for more info on this.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/yquake2-appimage

[read more]
item.description:
Yamagi Quake II
(Shooter)
Yamagi Quake II is an alternative client for id Software's Quake II. Our goal is to provide the best Quake II experience possible, we strive to preserve the gameplay as it was back in 1997. Thus we aim mostly for bug fixes, stability and gentle enhancements were appropriate. Yamagi Quake II has a lot of unique features. The most notables ones are:
A modern OpenGL 3.2 renderer, providing a greatly enhanced look and feel. The original OpenGL 1.4 and even the Software renderers are still supported. Both 3D accelerated renderers support anisotropic filtering and multisampling anti aliasing.
Full support for widescreen displays and arbitrary resolutions. The HUD can be scaled to be readable on high resolutions.
Support for surround sound, from stereo up to 7.1 channels and even HRTF. The background music can be played from OGG/Vorbis files, a CD drive is no longer necessary.
A rewritten savegame system. Yamagi Quake II savegames are completely reliable and backward compatible between releases as long as the principle architecture stays the same.
Highly precise timings. For example, on a flat panel display with a 59.95 hertz refresh rate and vertical synchronisation (VSync) enabled Yamagi Quake II is running at exactly 59.95 frames per second.
In comparison with the original client over 1.500 bugs were fixed. The Yamagi Quake II client is very well tested and stable. The dedicated server is able to run for weeks without a single restart. Last but not least the code is fully 64 bit clean and highly portable.

Commercial data files are required to run the supported game. These can be aquired though a multitude of sources. See the manual for more info on this.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/yquake2-appimage

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Yamagi Quake II
(Shooter)
Yamagi Quake II is an alternative client for id Software's Quake II. Our goal is to provide the best Quake II experience possible, we strive to preserve the gameplay as it was back in 1997. Thus we aim mostly for bug fixes, stability and gentle enhancements were appropriate. Yamagi Quake II has a lot of unique features. The most notables ones are:
A modern OpenGL 3.2 renderer, providing a greatly enhanced look and feel. The original OpenGL 1.4 and even the Software renderers are still supported. Both 3D accelerated renderers support anisotropic filtering and multisampling anti aliasing.
Full support for widescreen displays and arbitrary resolutions. The HUD can be scaled to be readable on high resolutions.
Support for surround sound, from stereo up to 7.1 channels and even HRTF. The background music can be played from OGG/Vorbis files, a CD drive is no longer necessary.
A rewritten savegame system. Yamagi Quake II savegames are completely reliable and backward compatible between releases as long as the principle architecture stays the same.
Highly precise timings. For example, on a flat panel display with a 59.95 hertz refresh rate and vertical synchronisation (VSync) enabled Yamagi Quake II is running at exactly 59.95 frames per second.
In comparison with the original client over 1.500 bugs were fixed. The Yamagi Quake II client is very well tested and stable. The dedicated server is able to run for weeks without a single restart. Last but not least the code is fully 64 bit clean and highly portable.

Commercial data files are required to run the supported game. These can be aquired though a multitude of sources. See the manual for more info on this.

AppImage repo: https://github.com/tx00100xt/yquake2-appimage

[read more]
